channel.title: mad345(T)_w01 on FALL 2020-2021

item.title: MAD345 Mining II(T), Week 01
item.description: Date Topic October 7 Introduction Dear all, Textbooks for the MAD345 are as follows: Ratan Tatiya, 2005, “Surface and Underground Excavations: Methods, Techniques and Equipment”, Taylor & Francis Group, LLC Peter Darling (Ed.), 2011, “SME Mining Engineering Handbook, Third Edition”, Society for Mining, Metallurgy, and Exploration (US) See you tomorrow via Zoom! ☀️ GERTUNC
